title: Implement AI-powered text forecast generation using Cloudflare Workers AI
Add Cloudflare Workers AI binding to environment configuration
description: Configure Cloudflare Workers AI binding in wrangler.toml and update env.d.ts to include the AI binding. This is a prerequisite for all other AI-related work.

title: Create AI text generation library module with validation
description: Create src/lib/ai-text.ts with generateWeatherSummary function using Cloudflare Workers AI with validation and error handling.

title: Update openweathermap provider to use AI for text forecasts
description: Modify fetchTextForecast() in src/lib/providers/openweathermap.ts to use AI-generated summaries from the new ai-text module.

title: Create comprehensive tests for AI text generation
description: Create src/lib/ai-text.test.ts with unit tests for various forecast scenarios including error handling.

title: Update documentation with AI usage and configuration
description: Update README.md to document the AI-powered text forecast feature including configuration and examples.

title: Deploy AI text forecast feature and sync to GitHub
Create and checkout feature branch
description: Create feature branch swarm/cloudflare-ai-forecast if not exists, checkout branch

title: Commit AI text forecast changes
description: Commit all changes from the AI text forecast implementation with descriptive commit message

title: Push to GitHub remote
description: Push feature branch to GitHub remote with upstream tracking

title: Deploy to Cloudflare Workers
description: Build and deploy to Cloudflare Workers using wrangler deploy command

title: Create GitHub pull request
description: Create pull request on GitHub with summary of AI text forecast feature changes
